mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.student_no, s.name, s.gender, s.age, s.phone, s.class_id, s.address, c.class_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id
ORDER BY s.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT s.id, s.student_no, s.name, s.gender, s.age, s.phone, s.class_id, s.address, c.class_name FROM student s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (student_no, name, gender, age, phone, class_id, address) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{phone}, #{classId}, #{address})
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_no = #{studentNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, phone = #{phone}, class_id = #{classId}, address = #{address} WHERE id = #{id}
